categories.description: Sent to tenant admins when a new Region is provisioned in the tenant. Distinct from TenantDefaultRegionSeeded — that path is silent (the very first region is a system-provisioned invariant + would just noise up the inbox during tenant onboarding).

Sent to tenant admins when a Region is paused. Cannot opt out — new bookings blocked from this Region has direct ops impact and admins must know. Includes the reason (when set) + the expected_resume_at timestamp when the admin scheduled one.

Sent to tenant admins when the tenant's default Region flips. Cannot opt out — audit-critical because the default Region determines invoice calculations for legacy rows that lack an explicit region_id. Payload includes both from + to Region names.
